text: Stepping into this innovative, modern space, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass wall marks the threshold between the familiar corridor and the promise of discovery within. The words and visuals on the walls invite contemplation about human connection, change, and coexistence with technology. Surrounded by design and language that encourages reflection, I feel compelled to ponder my own role within the larger story of research, creativity, and the world’s ever-shifting landscape.
